name: Oven-Toasted Ham, Brie, and Apple Sandwiches

source.cookbook: The Best of Fine Cooking: Breakfast
source.author: Fine Cooking

intro: ham steak that’s labeled “ham in natural

ingredients.item: large baguette (about 1 lb), cut into 4 pieces
brie, most of the rind trimmed off, thinly sliced
medium Granny Smith apples, peeled (optional), cored, and cut into ¼-inch-thick wedges (about 1½ cups)
ham steak, thinly sliced on the diagonal

method: Meanwhile, melt the butter in a large (12-inch) heavy skillet over medium-high heat. Add the apples and cook, tossing every minute or so, until they start to soften and brown in places, 3 to 4 min- utes. Add the ham and cook, tossing gently, until it warms. Remove from the heat and gently toss with the mustard, honey, and thyme until the ham and apples are evenly coated. Using tongs, distribute the ham mixture into the warm pieces of baguette, secure with 2 tooth- picks, cut in half, and serve. oven-toasted ham, brie, and apple sandwiches
